key.name: dark-mode
key.description: If enabled, the app interface will use the dark theme.

key.name: dark-icons
key.description: If enabled, the icons are drawn with dark background instead of light one. This results into better constrast.

key.name: debug-data
key.summary: Write debug data to output files
key.description: If enabled, Turtlico writes to output files marks to help track errors.

key.name: auto-indent
key.description: If enabled, the app inserts automatically tabulators on new line when enter icon is dropped into the program.
